description_long: This is a stilted cabin with a prominent gable roof covered in reddish-brown tiles, extending well beyond the walls to provide deep eaves. The exterior is clad in brickwork, with large glass windows dominating the front facade, allowing ample natural light into the main living area. The cabin is elevated on cylindrical concrete pillars, giving it a raised appearance and likely protecting it from ground moisture or flooding. A wooden deck with a pinkish railing wraps around the front and one side, providing outdoor living space. The rear features a small covered entryway with a gabled awning, and the window arrangement is asymmetrical, with a mix of large and small rectangular panes. The overall design blends rustic materials with modern, open fenestration, making it suitable for both urban and natural settings.
description: A stilted brick cabin with a wide gable roof, large front windows, and a wraparound wooden deck with pink railings. The structure is elevated on concrete pillars and features a mix of large and small windows with a rear covered entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide gable roof, large glass windows, and the wooden deck with pink railings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brick wall, two asymmetrically placed windows, and the extension of the deck along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying two large windows under the gable and the supporting concrete pillars beneath the cabin.
description_view_3: Back view featuring the small covered entryway with a gabled awning, a single window, and the continuation of the deck.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with deep overhangs, covered in reddish-brown tiles
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical arrangement with three large rectangular windows on the front, two large windows on the rear, and two smaller windows on the side; windows are grouped in pairs or singles with no uniform pattern
attribute_door_placement: one exterior door located at the rear, beneath a small gabled awning, accessible from the deck
